MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: conscious disregard of tenant's rights.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Nov-20-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on November 20, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all landlord-tenant cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Both parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than November 9, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
